hero.title: Aeroland
hero.subtitle: Where the Future Takes Flight
hero.description: Punjab's premier planned township, adjacent to Chandigarh International Airport. A GMADA-backed development poised to become the region's most connected urban destination.

about.title: A New Urban Landmark in Punjab
about.description: Aeroland is a meticulously planned township by the Greater Mohali Area Development Authority (GMADA), strategically located in the villages of Nandiali, Dyalpur, Bakarpur, and Matran — in the heart of the emerging Chandigarh-Mohali urban corridor.
about.overview: Spanning across two well-defined pockets (Pocket A near Aerocity and Pocket B near Matran), Aeroland is designed to integrate seamlessly with the existing infrastructure of Aerocity, IT City Mohali, and the Chandigarh International Airport ecosystem.
about.vision: To create a world-class, self-sustaining township that harmonizes modern living with economic opportunity — serving as the gateway to Punjab's aviation and technology future.
about.mission: To deliver planned, transparent, and sustainable urban development backed by the Government of Punjab — offering investors, residents, and businesses a secure and high-value address near the Chandigarh International Airport.
about.notification: Social Impact Assessment Notification No. H-U-H1/65/2026-6H1/I/452 dated 03/03/2026

features.title: Prime Airport Proximity
features.description: Located directly adjacent to Chandigarh International Airport, Aeroland offers unparalleled connectivity for business and leisure.

features.title: GMADA Backed & Approved
features.description: Developed by the Greater Mohali Area Development Authority — a special development authority constituted by the Government of Punjab.

features.title: Expo City & AI Tower
features.description: India's first dedicated AI Tower coming to adjacent Expo City, with 300+ AI-based companies, data centers, and cybersecurity hubs.

features.title: ₹1,878 Crore Bypass
features.description: The 6-lane Zirakpur Bypass connecting Chandigarh and Panchkula is approved — dramatically improving regional connectivity.

features.title: Healthcare Infrastructure
features.description: A Government Medical College & Hospital (similar to GMCH-32) is planned for the Dayalpura area, enhancing quality of life.

features.title: Planned Green Township
features.description: Aeroland includes dedicated parks, utility zones, smart sensors, a startup incubation center, and a municipal park — built for sustainable living.

location.title: Strategically Located
location.description: Aeroland sits at the confluence of Punjab's most ambitious development zones — adjacent to Chandigarh International Airport, Aerocity, and IT City Mohali.
location.masterplan_description: The master plan shows Pocket A (north, near Dyalpur/Nandiali) and Pocket B (south, near Matran) — both within the Aerocity development zone.
highlights: Near IT City Mohali & Expo City

docs.title: Project Documents
docs.summary: The Aeroland Master Plan, prepared by GMADA, outlines a comprehensive township development across two pockets in the Dayalpura area near Zirakpur. Pocket A (larger, northern pocket) covers the villages of Nandiali and Dyalpur and is designed as a high-density residential and commercial zone. Pocket B (southern) covers Matran and Bari villages. The plan integrates road networks, green belts, utility zones, and commercial corridors aligned with the broader Aerocity and Expo City masterplan. Key infrastructure includes HT Line re-routing, an internal road grid, green belt zones, and commercial plots along main arterial roads.
